document_name: Official Hong Kong Film Censorship Ordinance Text
description: Text of the Film Censorship Ordinance and current guidelines governing content review, with any amendments relevant to the project’s Hong Kong setting.
steps_to_find: Access Hong Kong Legislation Portal (e.g., leginfo.gov.hk) to retrieve the latest ordinance text
Review associated censorship guidelines and amendments
Consult with censorship experts for interpretation

document_name: US Copyright Office Public Records: The Game remake rights
description: Public records and filings related to remake rights and any registrations potentially affecting rights clearance in the US or international contexts.
steps_to_find: Search the US Copyright Office database for the original title and related filings
Query rights holders’ registries and contract archives
Consult with U.S.-based entertainment counsel for interpretation

description: Publicly available box office data for Hong Kong market to inform revenue projections and release planning.
steps_to_find: Access official box office portals or industry bodies reporting HK market data

description: Text of the Hong Kong Employment Ordinance detailing labor standards, working hours, and related requirements for production crews.
steps_to_find: Retrieve the latest Employment Ordinance from the Hong Kong Labour Department or Legislation.gov.hk portal
Review applicability to film production contracts and crew arrangements

document_name: Official Hong Kong Intellectual Property Department - Register of Works / Rights
description: HKIPD records related to registered works and rights databases that may indicate rights status and ownership in relation to film material.
steps_to_find: Query HKIPD registers and databases for film-related registrations
Cross-reference with rights holders and production company filings
Consult with IP counsel for interpretation of results

description: Publicly accessible exchange rate data for HKD and USD to inform budgeting and hedging considerations.
steps_to_find: Consult HKMA or central bank data portals for latest rates
Review historical rate data for short- and mid-term hedging scenarios
